title: Levviata's Parasite Outbreak
description: Forge Lab's Parasite Outbreak but with my own twists and big improvements.
body:
# PROJECT IS ABANDONED, SORRY!

## Levviata's Parasite Outbreak 

Originally based on ForgeLab's Parasite Outbreak, this modpack aims to be a "more fleshed-out" approach to ForgeLab's entry while generally keeping the original concept, "better" performance (subjective), and "less" bloat (also subjective)

_([Having Issues/Crashes/Suggestions?](https://github.com/Levviata/LevviatasParasiteOutbreak1.12.2/issues))_

<details>
<summary>Issues fixed or improved on:</summary>
  
I do believe ForgeLab's pack has a variety of issues that needed to be worked on, so I did just that, list of what I generally did to "fix" it (subjective)

- Balancing Issues := Usage of Reskillable mod to have a rough control of progression, tweaked recipes, and a variety of gameplay-focused changes to improve playability
- Performance := Added Radk6's performance mod list, support for [Cleanroom launcher](https://github.com/CleanroomMC/Cleanroom), and GREATLY improved world generation by the usage of Recurrent Complex to replace the mod gen of almost all of the included mods, expect far far better performance.
- Outdated Mods := Updated a variety of mods and fixed compatibility issues down the road.
- Lack of an Issue Tracker := Uses GitHub for issue tracking.
- Lack of QoL := Added a variety of custom recipes, zenscripts, and mods (along with some own-made mods) to improve playability.
- Old Look := While not an issue I have recommended below (refer to the 'Requirements' section) the best options for a more modern look if you are into that.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Note:</summary>

Starting in May 2023, this was a project I had in mind after I saw ForgeLab's "100 Days in a Parasite Outbreak" video, and yes, this pack has a complete quest system in mind.

</details>



## Features

- Hbm's Nuclear Tech Mod
- Quests (Barely done)
- Mekanism: Community edition
- NO tinker's construct
- Skill locks on everything using Reskillable
- A few own-made mods for this mod pack exactly (and also some modified)
- New textures
- The Hordes (self-explanatory)
- Open Modular Turrets
- No nether :)
- Popular Recurrent Complex buildings/structures hotfix to have treasures in them
- QoL recipes and changes

(NOTE: This modpack is a big big w.i.p, major gameplay loops or objectives may be broken)

## Requirements

You will need:
- More than 4 GB of RAM (ideal amount is 6 to 8 GBs);
- A GPU + CPU from the year 2010 or above (rough baseline); 
- 4 GBs of RAM allocated in Minecraft.
- Forge or Cleanroom (1.12.2 focused Forge fork) mod launcher

<details>
<summary>What is Cleanroom?</summary>

Cleanroom is, in simple words, a new Forge fork that makes 1.12.2 work with Java 21 (ooo shiny new) instead of Java 8 (boo old java!) which in general is a big improvement in performance, security, and a lot more (AFAIK)

I recommend using Cleanroom with [GraalVM Java 21](https://www.graalvm.org/downloads/) as its the [best in raw performance and has the shortest load times.](https://github.com/Radk6/MC-Optimization-Guide/blob/85fe6cf2c438b2c2ecc6c9cd103d064db3a06186/java-n-stuff/java-things.md)

</details>

OPTIFINE IS NOT SUPPORTED, THERE ARE MODS IN PLACE TO (somewhat) REPLACE ITS FUNCTIONALITY.

[Converter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/converter) is a good resource pack that I recommend if you are searching for a more modern look.

[Nothirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nothirium) is another recommended optimization mod that improves chunk generation, and should work well with this mod pack.

<details>
<summary>My specs for reference:</summary>

> System Type	x64-based PC
> 
> Processor	AMD Ryzen 5 3600 6-Core Processor, 3600 Mhz, 6 Core(s), 12 Logical Processor(s)
> 
> Installed Physical Memory (RAM)	16.0 GB
> 
> Total Physical Memory	15.9 GB
> 
> GPU Nvidia GeForce GTX 1650

RAM allocated in Minecraft is 4GB.


</details>


## Bugs

Levviata's Ores' axes crash the game when right/left clicking some blocks

Trying to break a Lootr chest on creative seems to crash the game

Random crashes are somewhat expected, please report them to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Levviata/LevviatasParasiteOutbreak1.12.2/issues)



</details>




<details>
<summary>Archive:</summary>


~~[Fogger](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fogger) does not render properly in survival mode effectively making the mod useless, instead I opted for [Fog Tweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fog-tweaker).~~

~~Spider 2.0 causes AI-less skeletons to appear randomly in the world, thanks for [u/PhantomishHawk](https://www.reddit.com/user/PhantomishHawk/) for pointing this out on [this reddit post](https://www.reddit.com/r/Minecraft/comments/mmhfvj/bug_skeletons_with_no_ai_are_spawning_all_over_im/).~~

SHADERS DO NOT WORK; this is a known issue of Optifine with this modpack, no current or future fix planned. ALTERNATIVES: Resource packs.

OPTIFINE'S Fast Render AND Fast Math BREAK THE GAME, IF YOU ENABLED THEM YOU WILL HAVE TO EDIT THE CONFIGURATION BY HAND.


</details>
